---
title: "Kyle Cahitas"
subtitle: "Environmental Data Scientist | Cal Poly"
image: assets/photos/kyle_cahitas.jpg
about:
  template: trestles       # Quarto's built-in bio templates: jolla, trestles, solana, marquee, broadside
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/yahitas
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:kcahitas@calpoly.edu
---

MS student in Environmental Science at Cal Poly. I apply machine learning 
and geospatial methods to watershed hydrology problems — specifically LSTM 
streamflow forecasting and land-use change detection using satellite imagery.

Current projects: predicting peak discharge in ungauged basins using 
transfer learning, and building open tools for USGS data access.
